task_description: Integrate Daytona sandbox infrastructure into OpenChamber so that each chat session spawns a new Daytona container running OpenCode. The backend Express server orchestrates Daytona sandboxes (create/destroy), proxies OpenCode communication between the frontend and the container, implements a 10-minute inactivity timeout for auto-cleanup, and supports an exit command to manually destroy sandboxes. The frontend (used by the Android client) controls the sandbox lifecycle through the backend API.

verification.summary: All checks pass after two review iterations. Type-check (all 3 packages pass), lint (all 3 packages pass), build (all packages build successfully), tests (81 test files, 679 tests passing, 3 pre-existing skipped). Two review passes completed: v1 found 7 issues (all fixed), v2 found 3 remaining issues (all fixed). Status normalization, auth middleware, documentation, proxy caching, and WebSocket error handling are all addressed.
